name: Preset Agent Skills
description: AI agent skills for the Preset API: authenticate, discover workspaces, administer teams/workspaces, and use Superset workspace APIs.

skills.name: preset-api
skills.description: Authenticate with the Preset Management API. Required by all other skills.

skills.name: preset-workspaces
skills.description: List Preset teams and workspaces, resolve workspace hostnames, and inspect workspace membership.

skills.name: preset-admin
skills.description: Manage Preset team memberships, workspace lifecycle, invites, role identifiers, and audit logs with confirmation.

skills.name: preset-superset
skills.description: Discover workspace Superset version, OpenAPI, current-user permissions, menu capabilities, and API safety classification.

skills.name: preset-dashboards
skills.description: Inspect dashboards, charts, dashboard tabs, screenshots, thumbnails, and chart data safety boundaries.

skills.name: preset-datasets
skills.description: Inspect databases, schemas, catalogs, tables, datasets, columns, metrics, table metadata, and data-returning dataset boundaries.

skills.name: preset-sqllab
skills.description: Inspect SQL Lab bootstrap, query history, saved queries, and SQL execution safety boundaries.

skills.name: preset-import-export
skills.description: Route Superset workspace import/export workflows with disclosure and mutation gates.

skills.name: preset-embedding
skills.description: Inspect embedded dashboard configuration and route guest-token/trusted-domain workflows to security-sensitive review.
